cards.title: Local LLM Coaching
cards.content:
AI Golf CoachTrinity Swing Coach
**Grade / Focus:** {{ states('sensor.golf_swing_analyzer_last_swing_priority_fault') or 'Waiting for Trinity analysis' }} **Quick Summary:** {{ states('sensor.golf_swing_analyzer_last_swing_why_it_matters') }} **Observations:** {{ states('sensor.golf_swing_analyzer_last_swing_evidence') }} **Recommended Drills:** {{ states('sensor.golf_swing_analyzer_last_swing_drill') }} **Confidence / Next Swing:** {{ states('sensor.golf_swing_analyzer_last_swing_confidence') }} **Fallback metrics:** {{ states('sensor.golf_swing_analyzer_last_swing_summary') }} **LLM status:** {{ states('sensor.golf_swing_analyzer_last_swing_llm_status') }} {{ states('sensor.golf_swing_analyzer_last_swing_llm_error') }}

card_mod.style: ha-card { border: 1px solid rgba(56,248,255,.22); border-radius: 24px; color: #eef8ff; background: radial-gradient(circle at 85% 10%, rgba(56,248,255,.18), transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at 15% 90%, rgba(168,85,247,.22), transparent 34%), linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(18,25,45,.94), rgba(8,12,24,.86)); box-shadow: 0 22px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.34); overflow: hidden; } ha-card .card-header { color: #8ffcff; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 950; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; } ha-markdown { color: #eef8ff; } .coach-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .coach-title img { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 999px; object-fit: cover; box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(247,255,92,.20); background: rgba(255,255,255,.9); } .coach-title span { display: block; color: #8ffcff; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 950; letter-spacing: .16em; text-transform: uppercase; } .coach-title b { display: block; color: #f7ff8a; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.1; } ha-markdown strong { color: #8ffcff; } :host { margin-top: 4px; display: block; }
